content.full_text:
STATE CAPITOL
P.O. BOX 942849
SACRAMENTO, CA 94249-0001
(916) 445-7333

DISTRICT OFFICE
12822 GARDEN GROVE BLVD.
SUITE A
GARDEN GROVE, CA 92643
(714) 537-4477

COMMITTEES:
EDUCATION
ENVIRONMENTAL SAFETY
AND TOXIC MATERIALS
HOUSING AND COMMUNITY
DEVELOPMENT
PUBLIC SAFETY
TRANSPORTATION

Assembly
California Legislature

TOM UMBERG
ASSEMBLYMAN, SEVENTY-SECOND DISTRICT

April 26, 1991

Scott Hallabrin
Acting Chief, Legal Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

In an effort to assure correct and legal disclosure of gifts
that Assemblyman Tom Umberg may have recently received, I am
writing to you today to seek your written advice.

Disneyland, which is located within our Assembly District,
recently sent the Assemblyman the enclosed invitation to a
special preview event they were sponsoring for Orange County
elected officials and their families. The Assemblyman, his
three young children, and a babysitter (his wife is still on
active duty with Operation Desert Shield) attended the event
receiving the following from Disneyland:

* 2 Adult Tickets
* 2 Child Tickets (one child was under the minimum
  age and did not require a ticket.)
* 4 Meal Vouchers

My question for you is: Under the new rules, would this be
considered a reportable gift to Assemblyman Umberg that must
be reported? If so, what is reportable -- all 4 tickets and
the meal vouchers or just the Assemblyman's individual ticket
and meal voucher? Please let me know.

Thank you for your attention to this request and if you have
any further questions on this situation, please do not
hesitate to contact me at (714) 537-4477.

Sincerely,

[signature]

GEORGE L. URCH
Chief of Staff

Enclosure

Printed on Recycled Paper

Featuring the stars of Disney's hit TV shows:

❖ Disney's DuckTales

❖ Disney's Adventures of the Gummi Bears

❖ Chip 'N Dale's Rescue Rangers

❖ Tale Spin

Enjoy all-new Disneyland adventures for 1991!

TV's most popular animated stars have arrived at Disneyland Park and the Magic Kingdom will never be the same! Baloo and the "Tale Spin" gang debut in "Plane Crazy," a high-flying, new musical comedy, performed live on stage. Young cartoon fans will also enjoy meeting the stars in their own fun-filled adventure, featuring imaginative attractions created just for kids—and just for fun!

Complimentary preview days for you and your family

Your entire family is invited to The Disney Afternoon Live! at Disneyland on the day of your choice.

Saturday March 16 • Sunday March 17
Saturday March 23 • Sunday March 24

Bring this card with you for complimentary Disneyland parking and admission, reserved seating at special premiere performances of "Plane Crazy" and lunch or dinner at selected Disneyland restaurants.

Please arrive between 9 a.m. and 6 p.m. and present this card at the reception table located in front of Guest Relations at the Disneyland main entrance. (Disneyland will be open until 12 midnight on all four dates.) This invitation is non-transferable. Identification will be requested.

To attend this special family event, please R.S.V.P. by calling (714) 999-4445 by March 11.
